issues.description: Text says 'during this turn' which indicates the boost applies for the remainder of the current turn only. Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' (not 'EndOfTurn'). 'EndOfTurn' implies the effect expires at end of turn, but 'during this turn' is the active period constraint.
Target must specify the card name filter. Text restricts to '[Charlotte Pudding]' cards only. Should include condition or filter specifying 'hasCardName:Charlotte Pudding' or similar mechanism.
